register.title: Sign up
register.subtitle: Create your chef account
register.cityHelper: E.g: Paris, Lyon, Marseille - Where do you offer your services?
register.phoneFormat: Format: +33 X XX XX XX XX
register.phoneExistsMessage: This phone number is already associated with an account. Would you like to sign in?

otp.title: Code Verification
otp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone to activate your chef account.
otp.codeSent: A verification code has been sent to your number
otp.resendError: Failed to send, try again later
otp.fallbackNewCode: A new code has been sent
otp.fallbackNewCodeDesc: The previous code has expired. Please enter the new code received by SMS.
otp.verifyNetworkError: Unable to verify the code. Please check your internet connection.
otp.resendFallbackFailed: Unable to send a new code. Please try again.

errors.networkError: No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
errors.serverError: The server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
errors.timeoutError: The request took too long. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknownError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.userNotFound: No account found with this number.
errors.accountNotActivated: Your account is not yet activated.
errors.otpInvalid: The verification code is incorrect or has expired.
errors.otpSendFailed: Failed to send the code. Please try again.
errors.registrationFailed: Registration failed. Please check your information.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account already exists with this information. Please sign in.
